First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The LifeX 2050 Inflation-Protected Longevity Income ETF (LIAE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages US Treasury exposure, aiming to provide reliable monthly realized inflation-adjusted distributions through 2050. The fund is designed to appeal to investors born in 1950 and reaching age 100. LIAE was launched on Sep 13, 2024 and is issued by Stone Ridge.
